hero.subtitle: Create optimized Vinted listings in under <1>3 minutes</1>, <2>clearer</2>, <4>complete</4> and at the <3>right price</3>.
hero.description: Upload photos, answer a few questions, and get a professional listing ready for Vinted in under 3 minutes. Every detail optimized to boost your <1>sales probability</1>.

problem.title: Creating a listing that sells takes too much time and effort

items.photos: Unoptimized photos → you waste time reshooting and buyers scroll past
items.title: Bare title → you have to figure it out with no idea what works
items.description: Weak description → you lose minutes writing with no results
items.details: Missing details → you answer private questions, slowing down sales
items.price: Wrong price → no clicks, hours of work wasted
items.value: No perceived value → users scroll, you lose time

problem.closing: Every minute spent creating listings manually
problem.closingHighlight: is a minute you are not selling.

solution.subtitle: Create optimized listings in under 3 minutes. Then let AI maximize your sales, with the support of a dedicated coach.

studio.title: SAFEViN Studio
studio.body: Thanks to years of experience selling on Vinted. Our system is specifically designed for Vinted. By uploading your photos, you will have a tailor-made listing to reach more people, receive offers, and sell at the right price.

artist.title: SAFEViN Artist Director
artist.body: Entrust the visual campaigns of your items to SAFEViN: We improve every photo to ensure consistency and quality in a short time, so your ad communicates professionalism and attracts more buyers as well as being beautiful to look at.

coach.title: SAFEViN Coach
coach.body: Actively supports you with targeted questions to help you solve problems and reach your sales goal faster. Guides you on photos, titles, descriptions and strategies in under 3 minutes per listing.

pillars.subtitle: Every image is rated on 4 key parameters to maximize your selling probability quickly.

qualita.label: Quality
qualita.body: We evaluate the sharpness and definition of every photo. Grainy or blurry images dramatically reduce buyer trust. For top scores shoot in natural light, with a stable camera and focus on the garment.

luce.label: Light
luce.body: We analyze how light hits the garment: backlight, harsh shadows or under-exposure hide important details. Frontal natural light (e.g. by a window) is always the best choice to show real color and detail.

contrasto.label: Contrast
contrasto.body: The garment must stand out from the background. Effective contrast makes the product readable and the protagonist of the image. Use a background opposite to the garment color (light for dark items, dark for light items).

completezza.label: Completeness
completezza.body: We check that the photo set covers all the necessary angles: front, back, details, labels and any defects. A complete set removes buyer doubts and speeds up the purchase decision.

how.title: Your listing ready in 3 minutes
how.subtitle: Upload, answer, publish. No more hours in front of the screen.

upload.title: Upload your photos

copy.description: Get title, description and strategic price ready to copy and publish directly to Vinted.

disclaimer.label: Disclaimer
disclaimer.p1: SafeViN is an independent tool: we don't partner with Vinted.
disclaimer.p2: We don't guarantee certain results: outcomes also depend on product, price, demand and offer quality. SafeViN gives you tools and analysis, but final success is influenced by many market factors.

footer.note: SAFEViN is an independent listing analysis and optimization ecosystem. Not affiliated with Vinted. Results depend on the quality of the data provided and market conditions.
